image.title: NAMD Davis, TM Clemente, OK Giddings, K Ross, RS Cunningham, L Smith, E Simpson, Y Liu, K Kloepfer, IS Ramsey, Y Zhao, CM Robinson, SD Gilk, B Gaston

item.title: A treatment that eliminates SARS-CoV-2 replication in human airway epithelial cells and is safe for inhalation as an aerosol in healthy human subjects.
